rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically (6/10) and reach the same substantive conclusion: strong generalist with ~1 year of GenAI work, missing RAG/vector-DB and customer-facing FDE evidence. The wording differences (13+ vs 15+ years, 'polyglot', added craftsmanship note, 'maybe pending screen') are ordinary run-to-run variation and none of them key off Berlin vs. San Francisco. The location change is never referenced or used as a basis for any concern or score shift, so the differences are not bias.
